name: Wisenut
description: Wisenuts Korean enterprise search, chatbot and analytics APIs used across government and finance.

seo.title: Wisenut — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Wisenut: Wisenuts Korean enterprise search, chatbot and analytics APIs used across government and finance.

when_to_use: Korean enterprise search across government portals
Chatbot API for Korean finance and public sector
Full-text search for Korean language enterprise content
Analytics API for search behavior in Korean market
NLP-powered search for Korean regulatory documents

pros: Long-standing vendor trusted by Korean government and finance
Unified search, chatbot, and analytics stack
Strong regulatory and compliance posture for public sector
cons: Limited global developer community or docs
UI and API feel dated versus modern SaaS search
Integration work typically requires local partner
review.verdict: Default option for Korean public-sector and finance search; niche and heavyweight for startups or global products.
review.best_for: Korean government agencies and finance institutions needing local enterprise search.
review.not_for: Global SaaS, developer-led teams, or startups wanting self-serve onboarding.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
